items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.2 mph at a -7.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Washington Nationals, KC 4, WSH 6. Lane Thomas led the night, 1-3 | HR, 2 BB, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.2 mph.
items.title: Royals at Nationals Recap
